meta.structure: One repeating 4-week cycle. Minimum dose: Push A + Pull B once each per week, sets taken 0-2 reps from failure. Knee Zero is the daily/easy ATG maintenance session — do it as often as you like, it is not fatiguing.
meta.tempo_notation: 4 digits = eccentric/bottom-pause/concentric/top-pause seconds (e.g. 30X1 = 3s down, 0s pause, eXplosive up, 1s hold). '-' = not a tempo movement (walks, holds, stretches).
meta.progression: Leverage double progression: add reps within the range; once all sets hit the top, move to a harder VARIATION (more foot elevation, more pseudo-planche lean, floor shrimp instead of elevated, slower eccentric) and reset reps to the low end. Intensity is the non-negotiable — research shows 1-2 near-failure sessions/week maintains strength and size for months, but only if sets end 0-2 reps from failure.
meta.sources: Spiering et al. 2021 (J Strength Cond Res) maintenance dose; Sports Medicine 2024 minimal-dose overview; Ben Patrick Knee Ability Zero (zero-equipment ATG); r/bodyweightfitness progression charts.
meta.equipment: None required. A light resistance band restores rows/face pulls if packed. Furniture substitutes: bed/chair = foot elevation, sturdy table = rows, doorframe = sissy squat assist, towel = sliding leg curls, stairs = Patrick step / calf raises.

Push A: Hardest variation you can do for 0-2 reps in reserve
Bed/chair; add pseudo-planche lean to progress
Hold furniture for balance; elevate front foot to regress
Diamond Pushup or Band Triceps Ext
Pull B: Slow with a hard 1s squeeze; feet further forward = harder
Anchor to door/post, heaviest tension, pause at chest
Towel under heels, bridge high, curl in slow
Bodyweight or band under foot; 3s down
Band Curl or Towel Iso Curl
Knee Zero: Anywhere — hallway, park, hill; knees over toes
Butt against wall, legs straight, toes up
Stair/step edge, full stretch at the bottom
Stair edge, knee over toes, slow lower
Bodyweight; elevate front foot on a step to regress
Rear foot on wall/couch, squeeze glute
